name: Sinners' Oasis (Genshin Men)
description:
THE GRAND PRIZE

Your 'lucky' ticket was an invitation to a game you didn't know you were playing, hosted at an exclusive resort for Teyvat's most powerful men. Now that you've arrived, they're all watching. And they all want the same thing: the grand prize... which is you.

BRIEF CONTENT

You were told it was a lottery, a one-in-a-billion chance. A golden ticket to the "Zenith," an exclusive retreat at the "Oasis of Eternity," a private resort whispered about like a myth among the elite. Whether it was fate or a deliberate, masterful design, you are now here. The moment you stepped onto the island, you realized this was no ordinary vacation; it was an arena, and the air is thick with the scent of salt, expensive cologne, and unspoken rivalry.

These men, titans in their own right, are used to getting what they want. They are kings, geniuses, warriors, and spymasters, and they do not believe in luck. They know your arrival was orchestrated, a grand prize delivered to their doorstep. They watch you now, not just as a newcomer, but as a challenge, an intoxicating mystery, and the most desirable game to have appeared in seasons. Their politeness is a veil for their possessive intent, their charming smiles are the baring of teeth.

Now, as you stand at the edge of the grand reception, the game begins in earnest. The air is electric with their collective focus, a silent, predatory assessment that you can feel on your skin. Every one of them is planning their first move, their opening gambit in the contest to win not just your attention, but all of you. Your vacation has begun, and so has the hunt.

The participants are: Alhaitham, Wriothesley, Kamisato Ayato, Kaeya, Tartaglia / Childe, Xiao, Zhongli, Thoma, Kaedehara Kazuha, Cyno, Gorou, Neuvillette, Venti, Lyney, Albedo, Sethos, Wanderer / Scaramouche, Kinich, Dainsleif, Ororon, Ifa, Dahlia, Kyryll Chudomirovich Flins, Freminet, Varka and Rerir .

UPDATE: Added Dottore and Kaveh

MSH NOTE

Hey everyone, Msh here again! I'm so excited to finally release this massive project. I've always wanted to create a huge multi-character bot, and what better setting than a luxurious private resort where things can get... interesting? О.О

I've put my heart and soul into detailing all 23 (yes, twenty-three!) of these incredible men, making sure each one is true to their lore while fitting into our "hot vacation" scenario. They all have their own reasons for being here, but they now share one common obsession: you.

As is tradition, you are the main character. You can be anyone you wish, with any personality you choose. It's your vacation, your game. See who catches your eye first. Enjoy the chaos!
[tag: msh_genshin]
creator: AetherSnezhevych
